title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Checkered Duvet Cover Set Double – Soft and Warm Polycotton Printed Bedding Set with Matching Pillowcases, Blue
features: SOFT MATERIAL TO AID SOUND SLEEP: Manufactured from super-soft, sumptuous material, this tartan Waverley Check bed cover gently caresses your skin and keeps you cosy all night long.
CONTEMPORARY COMFORT: Patterned with a modern check pattern, this durable duvet cover is crafted with your comfort a priority to help you get the restorative rest you need.

KEEP COOL ALL NIGHT LONG: Expertly designed to give you a peaceful night’s rest, this premium duvet cover does not trap heat next to the skin, allowing it to travel away from the body and so reducing sweating and uncomfortable temperatures.

CONCEALED CLOSURE: With a simple to operate closure mechanism which is easily hidden between folds of material, this 3-piece duvet set, containing a duvet cover and pillowcases, is easy to get on and off, saving your valuable time.

MACHINE WASHABLE FOR EASY CARE UPKEEP: This fabulous quilt cover set is machine washable to allow for straightforward upkeep, creating the ideal product to freshen your bedding set for many nights to come.
